1:
Charmion begins explaining how the observers of Anagnorisis approach rest and recuperation, when she realizes that she hasn't inquired about your nutritional requirements. The suddenly panicked ancient sets her lecture aside, sending you west of the Mourning Dew to gather a handful of Archestratus flowers while she rushes off to make urgent culinary preparations.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.
